# revolut_plan (Data Source)

Look up a Revolut subscription plan by id, including its full variations -> phases -> subscription_items pricing tree.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "revolut_plan" "existing" {
  id = "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
}

output "plan_name" {
  value = data.revolut_plan.existing.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Plan UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `name` (String) Plan name.
- `state` (String) Plan lifecycle state.
- `trial_duration` (String) ISO-8601 trial duration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `variations` (Attributes List) Pricing options for the plan. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variations))

<a id="nestedatt--variations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variations`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Variation UUID.
- `phases` (Attributes List) Billing stages of this variation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variations--phases))
- `trial_duration` (String) ISO-8601 trial duration for this variation.

<a id="nestedatt--variations--phases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variations.phases`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Charge amount in minor units.
- `currency` (String) ISO 4217 currency code.
- `cycle_count` (Number) Number of cycles (null = indefinite).
- `cycle_duration` (String) ISO-8601 billing cycle duration.
- `id` (String) Phase UUID.
- `ordinal` (Number) 1-based sequence position.
- `subscription_items` (Attributes List) Line items billed within this phase. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variations--phases--subscription_items))

<a id="nestedatt--variations--phases--subscription_items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variations.phases.subscription_items`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Item amount in minor units.
- `quantity` (Number) Item quantity.
- `type` (String) Item type: flat or usage.
